title: The Most Important Gates in Quantum Computing Explained
summary: IBM Technology explains fundamental quantum computing gates and their role in quantum circuits. The video covers qubits, superposition, entanglement, and key gates like Hadamard and CNOT that form the basis of quantum computation.
